item.title: 传奇黑客马特·苏伊克论人工智能时代的网络战争
item.description:
实体与数字的界限正日益模糊。

【原文：

The lines between physical and digital are blurring.

】

item.title: 在罗斯班克，西蒙·佩克汉姆寻求更快实现"买入、改善、出售"
item.description: 近年来伦敦资本市场的故事，主要由海外企业趁英国估值低迷之际大举收购企业所主导。西蒙·佩克汉姆却在反其道而行之。【原文：The story of London’s capital markets in recent years has been dominated by overseas firms taking advantage of low UK valuations to snap up businesses. Simon Peckham is pushing in the other direction.】

item.title: 零散话题：马特·苏伊克谈人工智能时代的网络战争（播客）
item.description: 我们习惯将战争划分为两个截然不同的领域：物理战场与数字战场。然而这两者之间的界限正日益模糊。 上周，伊朗对阿联酋和巴林的数据中心发动了无人机袭击。据报道，以色列一直在黑客攻击德黑兰的交通信号灯，而本周伊朗疑似对美国医疗器械公司史赛克发动了网络攻击——这些事件都印证了人们长期以来的担忧：黑客可能将重要物理基础设施作为攻击目标。本期节目中，我们将与马特·苏伊奇对话。【原文：We tend to think of warfare in two distinct arenas: the physical and the digital. Increasingly, however, those lines are blurring. Last week, Iran launched drone strikes on data centers in the UAE and Bahrain. Israel has reportedly been hacking traffic lights in Tehran, and this week brought a suspected Iranian cyberattack on US medical device company Stryker, all underscoring long-held fears that hackers could take aim at vital physical infrastructure. On this episode, we speak with Matt Suiche】

item.title: 印度卢比对冲成本攀升，进口商为更多损失做准备
item.description: 受原油价格飙升影响，印度卢比汇率跌至历史新低，迫使当地进口商争相规避风险，导致防范货币进一步贬值的成本上升。【原文：The Indian rupee’s slide to record lows on the back of soaring crude prices has sent local importers rushing for cover, driving up the cost of protecting against a further drop in the currency.】

item.title: 特斯拉能源部门获英国供电许可
item.description: 特斯拉公司旗下能源部门已获准在英国供电，这使该公司能够接触到英国家庭和企业的潜在客户。【原文：Tesla Inc.’s energy division has been granted a license to supply electricity in the UK, giving the company access to potential customers in British homes and businesses.】

item.title: 美元期权看涨情绪升至2022年以来最高水平，因战争推高油价
item.description: 期权市场显示，随着伊朗战争持续推高能源价格，美元正朝着2026年新高迈进。【原文：The dollar is on course for a fresh 2026 high, options markets show, as the Iran war keeps energy prices elevated.】

item.title: 德意志银行业绩表现参差不齐，奖金池仍增6.6%
item.description: 德意志银行将去年奖金总额上调6.6%，涨幅低于部分华尔街同行，各业务部门业绩表现参差不齐。【原文：Deutsche Bank AG raised its bonus pool for last year by 6.6%, less than some of its Wall Street peers, amid a mixed performance by the different business units.】

item.title: 德国10年期国债收益率因通胀担忧升至2023年以来最高水平
item.description: 德国国债连续第二日下跌，政府借贷成本升至2023年10月以来最高水平，因市场担忧伊朗战争将进一步推高通胀。【原文：German bonds fell for a second day, sending government borrowing costs to the highest level since October 2023 on worries the war in Iran will stoke inflation further.】

item.title: 日本不会向中东派遣扫雷舰，高市早苗表示
item.description: 日本首相高市早苗表示，日本的和平宪法不会阻止该国在美以伊战争结束后协助霍尔木兹海峡扫雷，但东京方面没有计划向该地区派遣扫雷舰。【原文：Japan’s pacifist constitution wouldn’t bar the country from helping with mine clearance around the Strait of Hormuz at the conclusion of the war between the US, Israel and Iran, but Tokyo has no plans to deploy minesweepers to the region, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi said.】

item.title: 欧洲天然气价格随油价上涨，航运危机持续恶化
item.description: 欧洲天然气价格跟随油价上涨，因中东航运动荡加剧，市场预期供应中断将持续数月。【原文：European natural gas followed oil higher as shipping turmoil expands in the Middle East and markets prepare for disruptions to continue for months.】

item.title: 本田警告全球电动汽车市场低迷将导致157亿美元损失
item.description: 本田汽车公司预计将计提高达2.5万亿日元（157亿美元）的费用，以重新审视其电动汽车战略。这家日本汽车制造商正加入全球品牌日益扩大的行列，这些品牌正遭受电动汽车转型困境的冲击。【原文：Honda Motor Co. expects charges of up to ¥2.5 trillion ($15.7 billion) as it rethinks its electric vehicle strategy, with the Japanese carmaker joining a growing list of global brands battered by the unraveling EV transition.】

item.title: 油价持续上涨，股市与英镑承压
戴姆勒卡车公司称订单增加与成本节约将抵消关税影响
item.description: 戴姆勒卡车控股公司计划实施更大幅度的成本削减，并寄望于更强劲的销售来抵消不断上涨的关税支出，以期将收益维持在与去年大致持平的水平。【原文：Daimler Truck Holding AG plans deeper cost cuts and is banking on stronger sales to counter rising tariff expenses, with the aim of keeping earnings roughly level with last year.】

item.title: 普京特使称已与特朗普政府官员讨论能源危机
item.description: 俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京的代表基里尔·德米特里耶夫表示，他在佛罗里达州与美国官员的会谈中讨论了全球能源市场的危机。【原文：Russian President Vladimir Putin’s envoy Kirill Dmitriev said he discussed the crisis in global energy markets at talks with US officials in Florida.】

item.title: 慕尼黑再保险旗下MEAG计划将基础设施债务规模提升至200亿欧元
item.description: 慕尼黑再保险旗下资产管理公司MEAG计划将基础设施债务投资规模扩大一倍，该公司正积极开拓加拿大等新兴市场，并探索规模较小的融资机会。【原文：Munich Re’s asset manager MEAG plans to double investments in infrastructure debt, as it increasingly targets new markets such as Canada and explores smaller financing opportunities.】

item.title: 全球债券抹去2026年涨幅，战争加剧通胀担忧
item.description: 全球债券已回吐年初至今的涨幅，因油价高企加剧了通胀重燃的担忧，引发固定收益市场全面抛售。【原文：Global bonds have surrendered their year-to-date gains as elevated oil prices stoke fears that inflation will reignite, triggering a selloff across fixed-income markets.】

item.title: 印度资产承压，能源冲击引发增长忧虑浮出水面
item.description: 伊朗战争引发的剧烈能源冲击正加剧印度股市的下跌，并推动卢比跌至历史新低，外国投资者持续采取防御姿态。【原文：A sharp energy shock from the Iran war is extending a slide in Indian equities and pushing the rupee to record lows as foreign investors stay on the defensive.】

item.title: 塞内加尔敦促支付款项以确保达喀尔奥运会升级工程按计划推进
item.description: 塞内加尔总理敦促迅速结清拖欠承包商的账单，以便首都标志性滨水区重建工程能够重启。该市正筹备举办非洲首届奥运会赛事。【原文：Senegal’s prime minister urged the swift settlement of unpaid contractor invoices so work can resume on a flagship waterfront redevelopment in the capital as the city prepares to host Africa’s first Olympic event.】

item.title: 韩国通过对美投资法案，特朗普启动新调查
item.description: 韩国国会批准了一项特别法案，该法案是履行向美国投资3500亿美元承诺的必要程序——此前数小时，特朗普政府正寻求对首尔加征关税的新法律依据。【原文：South Korea’s parliament approved a special bill required to implement a pledge to invest $350 billion in the US — hours after President Donald Trump’s administration sought new legal grounds for tariffs on Seoul.】

item.title: 马里将组建特别采矿部队遏制非法采矿活动
item.description: 马里正在组建一个拥有司法权的采矿工作组，负责监督这个西非国家的金矿开采和采石场。【原文：Mali is establishing a mining task force with judicial powers to oversee gold mining and quarrying sites in the West African nation.】

item.title: 标准银行利润创历史新高，得益于手续费增长与客户数量增加
item.description: 标准银行集团有限公司——按资产规模计算的非洲最大贷款机构——报告创纪录利润，因客户群扩大推动手续费及佣金收入增长，同时市场波动带动交易收入上升。【原文：Standard Bank Group Ltd., Africa’s biggest lender by assets, reported record profit as a growing client base bolstered fee and commission income, and as market volatility drove trading revenue.】

item.title: 伊朗战争迫使土耳其重新考虑利率路径并暂停降息
item.description: 土耳其的降息周期很可能在周四结束，因为战争导致的全球能源价格飙升，可能重新点燃该国的通胀问题。【原文：Turkey’s cycle of interest-rate cuts will likely end on Thursday as a war-driven spike in global energy prices threatens to reignite the country’s inflation woes.】

item.title: 卫星公司Iceye明年营收目标定为10亿欧元
item.description: 芬兰卫星情报公司Iceye Oy正稳步推进业务，预计明年营收将突破10亿欧元（约合12亿美元）。得益于多项政府订单的支撑，该公司正加速扩大生产规模。【原文：Finnish satellite intelligence company Iceye Oy is on track to grow revenue to more than €1 billion ($1.2 billion) next year as a raft of government orders allows it to ramp up production.】

item.title: 阿里巴巴支持的视频人工智能初创公司PixVerse完成3亿美元融资
item.description: 知情人士透露，PixVerse已完成3亿美元新一轮融资。随着人工智能生成视频领域的竞争日趋激烈，这家由阿里巴巴集团控股有限公司支持的初创企业由此晋升为独角兽企业。【原文：PixVerse has raised $300 million in fresh funding, people familiar with the matter said, elevating the startup backed by China’s Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. to unicorn status as the race to dominate AI-generated video intensifies.】

item.title: 棕榈油延续涨势，原油上涨提振生物燃料吸引力
item.description: 棕榈油期货延续涨势，有望实现六天内第五次上涨，因油价重返每桶100美元上方提振了生物燃料原料的需求前景。【原文：Palm oil futures extended a rally, heading for the fifth gain in six sessions, as oil’s jump back above $100 a barrel increases demand prospects for biofuel feedstocks.】

item.title: 乌克兰警告油价飙升将助长普京的战争资金
item.description: 乌克兰央行行长表示，美国主导的对伊朗制裁行动可能给这个饱受战争摧残的国家经济施加额外压力，同时在俄罗斯总统普京发动入侵的第五年为其提供助力。【原文：Ukraine’s central bank chief said the US-led campaign against Iran risks piling additional pressure on the country’s war-devastated economy while handing a boost to Russian President Vladimir Putin in the fifth year of his invasion.】

item.title: 香港逮捕对冲基金及经纪公司员工 涉内幕交易调查
item.description: 香港当局本周展开联合行动，打击涉嫌内幕交易和腐败行为，调查对象包括两家证券公司和一家对冲基金管理公司。【原文：Hong Kong authorities conducted a joint operation this week targeting alleged insider dealing and corruption, with the investigation including two securities firms and a hedge fund management firm.】

item.title: 印度餐饮股下跌，燃气短缺冲击餐厅
item.description: 印度餐饮外卖企业股价下跌，因中东冲突引发的烹饪燃气短缺导致餐厅警告运营将受影响。【原文：Shares of Indian food delivery firms dropped as restaurants warned of disruptions to operations after the Middle East conflict triggered a cooking-gas crunch.】

item.title: 印度拟推智能手机出口激励政策 助力苹果业务增长
item.description: 知情人士透露，印度正拟定新一轮智能手机制造激励政策，将政府补贴与出口量及本土零部件使用率挂钩。此举将惠及苹果公司、三星电子及其供应商。【原文：India is drafting a new round of smartphone manufacturing incentives that would link government subsidies to exports and deeper use of locally made components, in a move that will benefit Apple Inc., Samsung Electronics Co. and their suppliers, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 随着中东局势升级，铁矿石货运路线被迫改道
item.description: 中东局势持续恶化，导致铁矿石运输受阻。随着战争封锁全球最重要的航运通道之一，部分货船被迫中途改道驶往东亚地区。【原文：Iron ore shipments are being disrupted by the worsening conflict in the Middle East, with some cargoes diverted mid-voyage to East Asia as war chokes one of the world’s most critical shipping lanes.】
